response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify song start/end times and metadata. 2. Identified 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' by Azari and 'BANG!!!' by Giga/ryo. 3. Used search tool to find full lyrics for both songs in both original Japanese and English translation. 4. Compiled data into the final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance by several VTubers, including two vocal songs: 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' and 'BANG!!!'.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory scene involving dialogue between VTubers in a stylized setting. No singing.
A vocal performance of the song 'Whisper Whisper Whisper' by a group of VTubers. Text overlay indicates: '作詞・作曲: Azari'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's these eyes' fault that I can't forget
About the red stains of my errors or the traces of your play-biting
The overflowing love doesn't even have an end
While there's no one else around, I search for the devil
It's these ears' fault that my smiles are strained.
From within the thick walls, a voice calls out to me
It whispers, whispers, whispers, but it still doesn't let me touch
The devil breaks out of this cage and races away.
It's this mouth's fault that I'm in front of the mirror,
Stifling even the words I want to say tonight
I whisper, whisper, whisper, but I still won't open my heart.
I turn my back on god and while away time with the devil
I want to dream vaguely
I want to gently make you realize, that's all,
Oh, even you, oh, even you, oh, even you
I want to hide my unfading scars.
I want to gently make you worry, that's all,
Oh, even you, oh, even you
I'm searching for the devil
It's these ears' fault that my smiles are strained
From within the thick walls, a voice calls out to me
It whispers, whispers, whispers, but it still doesn't let me touch
The devil breaks out of this cage and races away
It's this mouth's fault that I'm in front of the mirror,
Stifling even the words I want to say tonight
I whisper, whisper, whisper, but I still won't open my heart
I turn my back on god and while away time with the devil
